description: Figure: cross-ortholog conservation of the dead auxilin P-loop
code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
rows=[('Human PTEN (active)','H C K A G K G R','C-X5-R','green'),
      ('Human DNAJC6','H C L D G R','C-X3-R','crimson'),
      ('Mouse Dnajc6','H C L D G R','C-X3-R','crimson'),
      ('Zebrafish dnajc6','T C S D G R','C-X3-R','crimson')]
fig,ax=plt.subplots(figsize=(9,3.2)); ax.axis('off')
ax.set_title('Auxilin P-loop is an evolutionarily fixed dead loop (C-X3-R)\nacross vertebrates; only PTEN retains the catalytic C-X5-R',fontsize=11,weight='bold')
ax.text(0.02,0.86,'Protein',weight='bold');ax.text(0.36,0.86,'P-loop motif',weight='bold')
ax.text(0.68,0.86,'Spacing',weight='bold');ax.text(0.88,0.86,'Cat.',weight='bold')
y=0.68
for name,motif,sp,c in rows:
    ax.text(0.02,y,name,fontsize=10)
    ax.text(0.36,y,motif,family='monospace',fontsize=11)
    ax.text(0.68,y,sp,fontsize=10)
    ax.text(0.88,y,'yes' if c=='green' else 'NO',color=c,weight='bold',fontsize=10)
    y-=0.17
ax.text(0.02,0.02,'Catalytic Cys retained in all (nucleophile) but the transition-state Arg register (PTEN R130)\n'
        'and general-acid Asp are absent in every auxilin ortholog -> conserved pseudophosphatase.',fontsize=8,color='dimgray')
plt.tight_layout(); plt.savefig('auxilin_ploop_conservation.png',dpi=130,bbox_inches='tight')
print('saved auxilin_ploop_conservation.png')
